fix: to-execution migrate command relocates legacy flat *_progress.json records into ADR-0008 homes by writer class (runtime basenames -> .excn/runtime/, rest -> .excn/progress/); location-only (fs.rename, byte-identical), idempotent, every move reported; doctor flags legacy layout and names migrate; gate-watch scan follows ledgers into .excn/progress/. Commit 813217e. code-standards + package-qa PASS (24+5-check fixtures). Deferred to Team Lead per the root-restamp ruling: live dogfood-root migration at a clean-tree point, and the durable package-qa rubric extension (alignment-gated).
title: Migrate command relocates Progress and Runtime Records; doctor flags the legacy flat layout
description: A new Scaffolder migrate command relocates known records on an already-stamped Instance into their ADR-0008 homes: versioned migration table, idempotent re-run, location-only (content byte-identical), every move reported. doctor detects the legacy flat layout and names the command. update's never-touch-work-tracking contract is unchanged. End-to-end: a temp Instance with the legacy flat layout migrates cleanly; re-run is a no-op; the dogfood root is migrated as proof.
acceptance_criteria: migrate relocates known *_progress.json records into .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/ by writer class
Re-running migrate is a no-op; file content is byte-identical after relocation
doctor reports the legacy flat layout and names migrate; reports clean after migration
package-qa rubric extended to exercise the migrate contract (chartered change, alignment-gated per ADR-0004)
Dogfood root migrated: no *_progress.json remains at .excn base; hooks and viewer keep working
